meta.title: Behind the Scenes Photoshop - "Meteor Shower" Live Stream with @EverydayAstronaut
meta.description:
The Quadrantids meteor shower is tonight! What a perfect opportunity to shoot and edit a picture letting people know about it! Check out the final image on Instagram @EverydayAstronaut

Follow my live streams on http://twitch.tv/everydayastronaut

Support me through Patreon at http://patreon.com/everydayastronaut
